headline: Mastercard Expands ASEAN AI Push As Valuation Sits Below Analyst Targets
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) is rolling out authenticated AI powered agentic transactions in Singapore and Malaysia as part of a wider ASEAN AI strategy. The company plans to open a regional AI Center of Excellence in Singapore to support AI deployment across payments and risk tools. New initiatives aim to connect 500 million more people and businesses to the digital economy by 2030, with a focus on small business cybersecurity and digital inclusion. Industry research from Juniper Research names...

headline: Global Innovation Platform Plug and Play Launches First Startup Accelerator in Cyprus
summary: Plug and Play, the world's largest innovation platform and venture capital firm, today announced its first location in Limassol, Cyprus. The initiative is co-funded by the Republic of Cyprus through the Cyprus Deputy Ministry of Research, Innovation and Digital Policy and the Research & Innovation Foundation (RIF) with support from corporations, ASBIS, Tototheo, Mastercard, and ECOMMBX.
